checks.detail: Need at least 30 closed paper trades under the review profile.
checks.name: stable_paper_trading

checks.detail: Paper Run Review must reach REVIEW_READY before live-pilot review.
checks.name: paper_shadow_review_ready

checks.detail: Paper report and portfolio analytics PnL are reconciled.
checks.name: paper_pnl_reconciled

checks.detail: No open paper positions.
checks.name: no_open_positions

checks.detail: Recent paper fills must be atomic arbitrage round trips.
checks.name: execution_engine_atomic

checks.detail: Risk engine evidence is present and losing-trade count is clean.
checks.name: risk_engine_validated

checks.detail: Provider Monitor is OK.
checks.name: provider_health_ok

checks.detail: Execution-cost evidence confidence must be HIGH.
checks.name: execution_cost_confidence

checks.detail: Execution realism must have shadow-ready evidence and zero live-ready approvals.
checks.name: execution_realism_shadow_ready

checks.detail: Report Audit has no blocking operational findings.
checks.name: report_audit_clean

checks.detail: Paper orders and analytics trade journal must exist for audit trail review.
checks.name: audit_trail_available

checks.detail: Trade journal/export evidence must be available for tax/accounting records.
checks.name: transaction_tax_export_available

checks.detail: Wallet Preflight is ready.
checks.name: wallet_preflight_ready

checks.detail: Transaction Simulation must pass exact calldata and eth_call checks before live review.
checks.name: transaction_simulation_passed

checks.detail: Live Safety remains blocked during readiness review.
checks.name: live_safety_blocked

checks.detail: Live feature flag is off.
checks.name: live_feature_off

checks.detail: Live and paper kill switches are on.
checks.name: kill_switch_on

checks.detail: Private key is absent.
checks.name: private_key_absent

checks.detail: Paper capital is within the configured live wallet ceiling.
checks.name: paper_live_wallet_parity

checks.detail: Paper trade cap and observed fills are within the live trade cap.
checks.name: paper_live_trade_cap_parity

checks.detail: Paper daily loss cap matches the tiny-live policy.
checks.name: paper_live_daily_loss_parity

checks.detail: Readiness review is restricted to Base ETH approved routes.
checks.name: base_eth_scope_only

notes: Live Readiness Checklist is a human review gate and never enables live trading.

Paper can use the same limits as the intended tiny-live pilot, but it cannot exactly reproduce gas spikes, failed transactions, MEV, mempool ordering, RPC outages, nonce issues, wallet signing, or pool movement between legs.
Use a live-parity paper profile before tiny real-money testing: wallet ceiling <= $500, per-trade cap <= tiny-live cap, daily loss cap > $0, Base only, USDC/WETH only.
